title: Assignment doesn't copy a list
problem: Make a backup of the scores list, then add 30 to the original — the backup should keep the first two scores.

trace.note: `backup = scores` does NOT copy the list. Both names now point at the same list object — notice the matching ref ids on scores and backup.
trace.checkpoint_prompt: backup was just set to scores. The next line appends 30 to scores. After it runs, what will backup hold?

trace.note: Appending to scores also changed backup: they are one and the same object. The 'backup' was never independent.
